inputs.text: Maine kal raat se bukhar hai, bahut tezi se badh raha hai, sir bhi bahut dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can also present with sudden high fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue

inputs.text: Aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Chikungunya can also cause joint pain, but retro-orbital pain is more specific to Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: red rash on arms and chest

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums is highly suggestive of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the specific combination of symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the absence of specific symptoms like chills and rigors

inputs.text: Main bahut kamzor mehsoos kar rahi hoon, pet bhi dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms are consistent with severe Dengue, which can cause hemorrhaging and abdominal pain

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of specific Dengue symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of specific Malaria symptoms
